name: Menstrual Care Product Reimbursement

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must use funds from a health flexible spending arrangement, health reimbursement arrangement, or HSA to purchase these products.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Expenses for menstrual care products are treated as medical care, allowing them to be reimbursed tax-free via FSAs, HRAs, or HSAs.
